testcase.name: test_elettrodo_keywords_detection
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration99_consumables.py:124: in test_elettrodo_keywords_detection assert data["normativa_target"] == "en_1090" E AssertionError: assert 'entrambe' == 'en_1090' E E - en_1090 E + entrambe

testcase.name: test_filo_1_0mm_targets_en_1090

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected en_1090 for 1.0mm wire, got entrambe assert 'entrambe' == 'en_1090'
- en_1090 + entrambe

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration99_consumables.py:144: in test_filo_1_0mm_targets_en_1090 assert data["normativa_target"] == "en_1090", f"Expected en_1090 for 1.0mm wire, got {data['normativa_target']}" E AssertionError: Expected en_1090 for 1.0mm wire, got entrambe E assert 'entrambe' == 'en_1090' E E - en_1090 E + entrambe

testcase.name: test_analyze_invoice_for_consumables
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration99_consumables.py:490: in test_analyze_invoice_for_consumables assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
